_doc: VISUALIZATION-ONLY config. Nothing here is citable — it only affects how the picture looks. Facts live in the other data/*.json files and are joined here by id/code.

sceneScale._note: Display-scale knobs (scene units, not metres). Adjustable at runtime via the UI. width:depth = 70:40 = 1.75 matches the default GeoData (LiDAR corridor) window's real E-W:N-S metre ratio (~866:501 m = 1.73), so the horizontal plan is ~isotropic. GeoData vertical uses a single true-scale 'Vertical exaggeration' control (default 1.0×).

datum._note: Nominal vertical datum for non-GeoData modes (paradata pd-nominal-datum). Range (plateau-valley) maps to plateauHeight scene units.

strataColors._note: Keyed by geology stratum `code`; thicknesses/roles are facts in geology.json. Colour-matched to the cited source figure (Brochure 2018 fig 4-2 / assets/geo-section-brochure.webp) rather than invented independently: li2/li1 sampled from that figure's own legend swatches (sandstone/marl), then pushed further apart in saturation since the figure separates them with a dot-vs-hatch pattern we don't render. ko/km3 have no digitised source figure to match (fig 4-3 is cited but not in the repo), so they continue the same warm/cool sequencing logic instead (ko = brownish-red, the real-world Keuper redbed convention).
